name: Generic Master Template - CyeroX Dev
author: KopeeDev <notkopee@gmail.com>
description: A master template for generic Pterodactyl eggs developed by KopeeDev for CyeroX Development. Configure for Bun, Dart, Deno, Elixir, C#, Java, Go, Luvit, Node.js, Nodemon, Python, or Rust.

docker_images._comment: UNCOMMENT THE IMAGE YOU NEED AND DELETE OR COMMENT OUT THE OTHERS

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# =========================================================================
# CyeroX Development - Generic Installation Script
# Copyright © 2026 KopeeDev (notkopee@gmail.com)
# Panel: CyeroX Dev | Team: CyeroX Development
# =========================================================================
# This script handles Git cloning and dependency installation for:
# Bun, Dart, Deno, Elixir, C#, Java, Go, Luvit, Node.js, Nodemon, Python, Rust
# =========================================================================

# Exit if any command fails
set -e

# Display copyright information
echo "========================================================================="
echo "CyeroX Development - Generic Server Installer"
echo "Copyright © 2026 KopeeDev (notkopee@gmail.com)"
echo "Panel: CyeroX Dev | Team: CyeroX Development"
echo "========================================================================="

# Update and install necessary packages
apt-get update
apt-get install -y git curl jq file tar unzip make gcc g++ python3

# Create and move to the server directory
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Handle Git Repository Clone or User Uploads
if [[ "{{GIT_REPO}}" != "" ]] && [[ "{{USER_UPLOAD}}" == "false" ]] || [[ "{{USER_UPLOAD}}" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "📦 Cloning repository from {{GIT_REPO}} (branch: {{GIT_BRANCH}})..."
    git clone --recurse-submodules --depth 1 --branch "{{GIT_BRANCH}}" "{{GIT_REPO}}" .
    echo "✅ Repository cloned."

    # --- LANGUAGE-SPECIFIC DEPENDENCY INSTALLATION ---
    # Uncomment the block for your target language

    << "_comment_node"
    # For Node.js/Nodemon
    if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "📦 Installing Node.js dependencies with npm..."
        npm install --omit=dev
        echo "✅ npm install complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No package.json found, skipping npm install."
    fi
    _comment_node

    << "_comment_python"
    # For Python
    if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
        echo "📦 Installing Python dependencies with pip..."
        pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
        echo "✅ pip install complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No requirements.txt found, skipping pip install."
    fi
    _comment_python

    << "_comment_go"
    # For Go (if building is required)
    if [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
        echo "📦 Downloading Go modules..."
        go mod download
        echo "✅ go mod download complete."
        echo "🛠️  Building Go application..."
        go build -o {{GO_OUTPUT}} .
        echo "✅ Build complete: {{GO_OUTPUT}}"
    else
        echo "⚠️  No go.mod found, skipping."
    fi
    _comment_go

    << "_comment_rust"
    # For Rust
    if [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "🛠️  Building Rust application in release mode..."
        cargo build --release
        echo "✅ Build complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No Cargo.toml found, skipping."
    fi
    _comment_rust

    << "_comment_java"
    # For Java (Maven)
    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "🛠️  Building Java application with Maven..."
        mvn clean package
        echo "✅ Maven build complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No pom.xml found, skipping build."
    fi
    _comment_java

    << "_comment_csharp"
    # For C# (Dotnet)
    if [ -f "*.csproj" ]; then
        echo "🛠️  Building C# application..."
        dotnet publish -c Release -o output
        echo "✅ Dotnet publish complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No .csproj file found, skipping build."
    fi
    _comment_csharp

    << "_comment_elixir"
    # For Elixir
    if [ -f "mix.exs" ]; then
        echo "📦 Installing Elixir dependencies..."
        mix local.hex --force
        mix deps.get
        echo "✅ Mix dependencies installed."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No mix.exs found, skipping."
    fi
    _comment_elixir

    << "_comment_dart"
    # For Dart
    if [ -f "pubspec.yaml" ]; then
        echo "📦 Getting Dart packages..."
        dart pub get
        echo "✅ Dart packages installed."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No pubspec.yaml found, skipping."
    fi
    _comment_dart

    << "_comment_bun"
    # For Bun
    if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "📦 Installing Bun dependencies..."
        bun install
        echo "✅ Bun install complete."
    else
        echo "⚠️  No package.json found, skipping bun install."
    fi
    _comment_bun

    << "_comment_deno"
    # For Deno (cache dependencies)
    if [ -f "deps.ts" ] || [ -f "import_map.json" ]; then
        echo "📦 Caching Deno dependencies..."
        if [ -f "main.ts" ]; then
            deno cache main.ts
        elif [ -f "main.js" ]; then
            deno cache main.js
        fi
        echo "✅ Deno dependencies cached."
    fi
    _comment_deno

    << "_comment_luvit"
    # For Luvit
    if [ -f "package.json" ] || [ -f "lit.json" ]; then
        echo "📦 Installing Luvit dependencies..."
        if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            lit install
        fi
        echo "✅ Luvit dependencies installed."
    fi
    _comment_luvit

    # --- END LANGUAGE-SPECIFIC INSTALLATION ---

else
    echo "📁 User upload mode selected or no Git repo provided. Skipping clone."
    echo "💡 Place your files in the /mnt/server directory."
fi

# Set ownership
chown -R container:container /mnt/server

echo "========================================================================="
echo "✅ Installation completed successfully!"
echo "Copyright © 2026 KopeeDev - CyeroX Development"
echo "========================================================================="
exit 0

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: The command used to start your server or application.

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: The URL of the Git repository to clone (e.g., https://github.com/user/repo.git). Leave empty to use uploaded files.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: The branch or tag to check out (default: master).

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to true if you will upload files manually instead of using Git.

variables._comment: Copyright 2026 KopeeDev - CyeroX Development - Additional Variables
variables.name: Go Output Binary Name
variables.description: (Go only) Name of the compiled output binary.

variables.name: Java Jar File
variables.description: (Java only) The name of the jar file to run if not specified in the startup command.

variables.name: Main Entry File
variables.description: The main entry file for your application (index.js, main.py, main.ts, etc.)

variables.name: Nodemon Watch Mode
variables.description: (Nodemon only) Enable file watching for auto-restart.

_copyright_notice: Copyright © 2026 KopeeDev (notkopee@gmail.com) - CyeroX Development. All rights reserved.
